ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration


Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration


Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Continued To Feb-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jon Vaught appeared via zoom for Luis Pinto (former administrator).

Judge Roeca disclosed that he reatined Mr.Vaught as a professional consultant in the past.

Mr. Vaught stated court appointed referee that they were assigned too is no longer in business, that he is waiting on a newly appointed court appointed counsel to do the inventory and appraisal and will need more time.

The Court referred to the order signed on October 23, 2025 for Order Appointing Referee Shirley Yawitz.

The matter is continued to Janaury 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Deleon. Not reported.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10-29-25. Post Script.
The matter is continued to February 04, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsels have been notified of the change.
